description_long: This bird features a streamlined, elongated body with a subtle curve along its back and a slightly pointed tail. Its plumage is predominantly light brown with intricate, darker mottled patterns across the back and wings, blending into paler, almost white underparts. The wings are long and narrow, with a gradient of brown to gray and white markings along the edges. The head is small and rounded, with a short, straight beak that is pale in color. The legs are not visible, suggesting they are tucked beneath the body, typical of a bird at rest or in a lifeless pose. The overall appearance is reminiscent of a ground-dwelling or urban-adapted bird, such as a dove or pigeon, commonly found in city environments.
description: A slender, mottled brown bird with a pointed tail, pale underparts, and long, narrow wings featuring gray and white markings.
description_view_0: Side view showing the bird's elongated body, intricate brown mottling, and the full length of the pointed tail and wings.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the symmetrical, tapered tail and the central alignment of the wings along the back.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same elongated form, mottled plumage, and the subtle gradient on the wings.
description_view_3: Front view emphasizing the rounded head, short beak, and the narrowing of the body toward the tail.
attribute_plumage_pattern: mottled and spotted with darker brown markings on a light brown base, pale underparts, and subtle gray and white wing accents
